{{Infobox group
| name = Advocates
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

''See also: [[Advocates Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Advocates are a group of self-proclaimed guardians of galactic civilization that originated as a band of vigilantes. They eventually gained quasi-official authority and became a vital component of [[life]] within the [[Free Worlds]], where they are viewed as heroic figures and models for citizenship. Their primary role is providing essential public services to those living outside the reach of standard police forces. However, perceptions of the organization vary significantly by region; while they are highly respected in the [[Free Worlds]], the [[Alliance]] views them as an ineffective force that refuses to share its proprietary [[Aethertech]]. Internal and external criticisms of the group include allegations of corruption, specifically that they prioritize protecting their reputation over all else and follow the leadership of [[Starhammer]] without question. The organization has also faced internal division regarding whether they should expand their influence across the galaxy or remain within their established mandate. Following the destruction of [[Starhammer]] and a major battle involving a [[Zenith Device]], the Advocates' headquarters was left in disrepair. Despite these challenges and leadership struggles among their [[Councilors]], some members are working toward rebuilding the organization to be stronger than before.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Advocates]] are self-proclaimed guardians of galactic civilization.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5">''The Captain'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Advocates]] are individuals who might pursue a criminal.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22">''The Captain'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Originally a group of vigilantes in the [[Free Worlds]] who gained quasi-official authority, the Advocates are an organization dedicated to protecting the galaxy. Members join through applications and wear blue and white uniforms, operating a fleet of one thousand ships that rely heavily on [[Aethertech]]. While they possess the authority to arrest individuals for crimes like robbery and piracy, they are described as corrupt despite their purpose of saving people. The group performs ship inspections, seals away unidentified relics, and maintains a presence near the [[Scylon system]]. Although they have faced conflict with various individuals and were eventually killed by [[Omega]], they have also provided personal testimonies to the [[Union]].}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] are a group that people join through applications.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c1">''The Engineer'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] wear blue and white uniforms.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c6">''The Engineer'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] have the authority to arrest individuals for crimes such as abduction, robbery, sabotage, and piracy.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] do not execute prisoners.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] are dedicated to the protection of the galaxy.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] have a presence near the [[Scylon system]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10">''The Engineer'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] are a group that performs inspections on ships.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11">''The Engineer'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] can distinguish between sloppy paperwork and criminal activity.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Advocates]] sometimes leave a trail of bodies behind them.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The narrator has waged war against the Advocates using the [[Lagomorph Contract]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c12">''The Engineer'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax and [[Sola]] carried two [[Advocates]] each.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Mell]] and [[Starhammer]] were once working against the Advocates.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c15">''The Engineer'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Advocates]] utilize blue-and-white ships, sometimes trimmed in silver.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The narrator's costume was modeled after the Advocates.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c16">''The Engineer'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Mell]] wants the Advocates organization to fall apart.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17">''The Engineer'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] have a duel format involving pistols at dawn using stun rounds.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Mell]] wants to avoid staying around the Advocates.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c19">''The Engineer'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] are described as corrupt but having a purpose to save people.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21">''The Engineer'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocate]] fleet consists of a thousand ships in blue and white.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c23">''The Engineer'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] are described as ordinary in a previous context.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c24">''The Engineer'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] are a group that may use [[life]]-pods.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c28">''The Engineer'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] are enemies of some of the narrator's allies.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] take in foreign ships from across the galaxy.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c30">''The Engineer'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] rely heavily on [[Aethertech]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31">''The Engineer'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Advocates]] seal away mysterious relics that defy identification.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] are a group that may not know who went after [[Doctor Nova]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33">''The Engineer'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The original [[Advocates]] were a group of vigilantes in the [[Free Worlds]] who gained quasi-official authority.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c34">''The Engineer'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Advocates]] are a group that can be dangerous in large numbers on a battlefield.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38">''The Engineer'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Mell]] mentions she will stop messing with the Advocates.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] are an organization.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40">''The Engineer'', chapter 40</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] have a headquarters ([[Advocate]] HQ).<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] are retreating and gathering forces.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41">''The Engineer'', chapter 41</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] are a group that the protagonists may face.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] have a warrant for the arrest of [[Jak Escalon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c43">''The Engineer'', chapter 43</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Omega]] killed the Advocates.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c43" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] are a group that [[Raion]] fears might kidnap [[Javik]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44">''The Engineer'', chapter 44</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] employ [[Undermaker]] in disaster relief.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Advocates]] are a group that [[Omega]] scared.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c45">''The Engineer'', chapter 45</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] were part of a plan that accounted for them but failed to save [[Leilari]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c46">''The Engineer'', chapter 46</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The wizard hired by [[Starhammer]] was contracted to the Advocates.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c46" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] claimed [[Doctor Nova]] and [[Spellbinder]] robbed transports, opened prisons, and stole billions of standards worth of goods.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c49">''The Engineer'', chapter 49</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Omega]] brought a team of shell-shocked [[Advocates]] with him.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c50">''The Engineer'', chapter 50</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Mell]]'s decoys can fool [[Advocates]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c50" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] include [[Steel Avalanche]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c51">''The Engineer'', chapter 51</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Advocates]] are loyal to [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c52">''The Engineer'', chapter 52</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Advocates]] fought against [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c54">''The Engineer'', chapter 54</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Advocates]] provide personal testimonies to the [[Union]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c55">''The Engineer'', chapter 55</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The Advocates initiated their involvement by placing bounties on the heads of [[Mell]] and the narrator. This group was later identified as a potential force behind various subspace blockades. Despite facing internal instability, the organization remained active and continued to clash with [[Raion]]. Ultimately, the Advocates reached their end when the group fell.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Advocates]] have placed a bounty on the narrator and [[Mell]]'s heads.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c4">''The Knight'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Advocates]] are a potential group responsible for subspace blockades.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c16">''The Knight'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Advocates]] are still present.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c19">''The Knight'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Advocates]] is a group currently in a state of instability.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c23">''The Knight'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Raion]] had a conflict with the Advocates.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c26">''The Knight'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Advocates]] have fallen.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c45">''The Knight'', chapter 45</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Advocates once served as leaders of an allied fleet alongside [[Starhammer]]. This period of influence ended when they were slaughtered within their own home. Despite this tragedy, the group maintains top-security vaults and a frozen prison. Their ability to act is further limited by internal politics, as they take no action when the [[Councilors]] are in disagreement.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Advocates]] led an allied fleet with [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c3">''The Pilot'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Advocates]] were slaughtered in their home.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4">''The Pilot'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Advocates]] possess top-security vaults.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c8">''The Pilot'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Advocates]] would take no action due to the [[Councilors]]' disagreement.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27">''The Pilot'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Advocates]] have a frozen prison.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37">''The Pilot'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“On the bright side, there is only minimal presence from the Advocates stationed nearby.”<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“Normally we do pistols at dawn. Stun rounds, of course.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“The Advocates might not know who went after Doctor Nova,<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“The Advocates are retreating. They’re gathering their forces, which means Starhammer is about to make a move.”<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“The plan accounted for the Advocates, so no one was there to save Leilari.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c46" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
